summary_text: その通りです。こちらの取り違えでした。`Kernel bootstrap` を前提作業として扱いすぎて、主タスクの `X引用投稿文` を後ろに追いやっていました。 `x-auto-post-guard` の前提で見ると、いま対象になっている引用投稿はこれです。 - mode: `draft only` - schedule: `2026-04-02 22:00` を維持 - language: 既存行は `English body` - quote handling: 引用URLは本文に入れず、`Source URLs` に保持 - Notion target: 既存行更新 - row: `0db993f9cf71` - title: `mini-AGIは組織から始まる` - source_url: `https://x.com/jack/status/2039004606890463261?s=20` 今の本文より締めた引用投稿文はこれです。 ```text “mini-AGI” is the catchy phrase. The more important signal is that Block is talking about organizational structure in the same sentence. That is the real shift. Many companies still treat AI as a model choice, a feature, or an extra product layer. But if AI changes how work is coordinated, then org design becomes part of the AI strategy. Better models help. They do not fix slow decisions, vague ownership, or broken communication by themselves. If the organization stays the same, the AI layer will inherit the same bottlenecks. Rebuilding around AI is not only a technical project. It is a governance and operating model project. ``` このまま次にやるべきは2択です。 - この英語版を既存 Notion 行に反映する - 日本語版も併記で作る 必要なら次でそのまま `Body` / `Body JA` 用に整えます。
